name: get_chat_export_files
description:
Fetch selected file contents from a HeroUI AI Chat export commit.
Call get_chat_export_manifest first, then pass its commitSha and selected manifest paths here.
Use this in chunks of at most 25 files and adapt the returned files into the user's local project instead of blindly overwriting unrelated files.

chatId.description: HeroUI AI Chat id to export.

paths.description: Manifest file paths to fetch. Fetch recommendedPaths first.
